questionHtml:
What is the name of this compound, using IUPAC rules?

A.     1,1-dimethylpropanoic acid

B.     3,3-dimethylpropanoic acid

C.     2-methylbutanoic acid

D.     3-methylbutanoic acid

meta.title: What is the name of this compound, using IUPAC rules? A. 1,1-dimethylpropanoic acid B. 3,3-dimethylpropanoic acid C. 2-methylbutanoic acid D. 3-methylbutanoic acid
